strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js and React-adjacent fullstack experience across multiple senior roles
Proven architecture and clean-code mindset with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practice
Berlin-based with relevant platform-building experience (Optilyz, RIDE, GISCollective) including Kubernetes and AWS
concerns: Seniority mismatch — candidate is Staff/Senior level applying for a junior/mid role
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed (MongoDB/MySQL primary); Nest.js not mentioned
Only basic German, which may be limiting for an on-site German construction/energy consulting environment
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, and Kubernetes, plus a strong software-craftsmanship background that easily covers the technical bar. However, the role targets entry/mid level, and this profile is clearly senior/staff, which raises fit and retention questions. Database experience leans toward MongoDB rather than the preferred PostgreSQL, and German proficiency is basic despite the on-site German-market context.
